name: suede_master_wav
description: Suede Labs audio mastering for independent artists, producers, podcasters, content creators, sync coordinators, label QC teams, and agents shipping release-ready audio through automated AI music pipelines. Takes a mixed but unmastered audio file and returns a loudness-normalized, spectrally-balanced, and limited master suitable for streaming platforms, broadcast, sync delivery, or direct release. Supports release mastering for streaming targets, podcast loudness normalization to broadcast standards, sync deliverable prep, content-creator audio polish, batch mastering, and paid x402/ACP agent commerce.

audio_url.description: Public HTTP(S) URL of the mixed audio file to master. Supports wav, flac, aiff, and mp3 up to 15 minutes long. wav or flac strongly recommended for best results.

target_loudness_lufs.description: Integrated loudness target in LUFS. Defaults to -14 LUFS (streaming standard). Use -16 for podcasts, -23 for EBU R128 broadcast, -9 for club masters.

preset.description: Tonal balance preset to apply during mastering.
